'''Bhu Cranna''' was a young [[Sorrusian]], son of the chief of the tribe, [[Goq Cranna]]. He and his father showed [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Astri Oddo]] location of the hiding place of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Ona Nobis]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]''
